THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT BRAY, LINDA DEFT SHALL RECOVER COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 1032(B). PLTF TO PROVIDE ACCESS TO DISABLED PARKING, REPAIR DEFT'S WINDOW IN THE SUM OF $225.00 AND PLTF TO PAY THE COSTS OF DEFT'S PARKING TICKETS FROM 4/15/99 IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
